title: The Jelly Bean Factory, Jelly Beans Gift 1.4 KG Tub, Gluten Free Sweets - 36 Natural, Huge Fruit Flavours, Chewy, Retro American Sweets for Kids, Adults, Christmas - Gourmet Pick and Mix Jellybeans
features: Gourmet Jelly Beans Gift: Yes! We have taken some of the greatest flavours in the world and infused them into our fancy little chewy sweets, meaning every jelly bean is bursting with 36 exciting, huge flavour favourites waiting to tantalise your senses!

Natural Flavourings: Experience the power of true flavour in our delicious halal jelly sweets and in life. We’re proud to say all our jelly beans are kosher, contain natural flavourings, plant based colours and are free from gelatine and gluten

36 Unique Flavours: With just one jar of jelly beans, you can experience a whole array of desserts, from sticky candy floss to fluffy marshmallows. Let’s not forget our drinks inspired beans! Strawberry Smoothie, Cherry Blossom Soda, the list goes on!

Jelly Beans Gift: Fun pick and mix sweets for kids and adults, packed with jelly beans in fruit flavours, an irresistible old school sweets gift ideal for variety of occasions; Father's Day, Valentines, Halloween, Christmas gift jar, birthday sweets and more

The Jelly Bean Factory: Our retro sweets contain flavour from the crispy shell to the chewy inside. Experience the power of true flavour in our delicious gourmet jelly beans sweet mix and in life! Ladies and gentlemen, activate your taste buds!
Kosher and Gluten Free: Gourmet jelly beans made from plant based colours, with natural flavours and free from 14 EU major allergens
